feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot change PO Net order value
entry.content:
User wants to change the PO net value. But couldn't edit the value.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance - turn off
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

is in Public Cloud possible to turn of the error: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance when we are creating Inbound Delivery from PO?

Thank you

#SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Difference/Similarities between Time zone settings in "Maintain business users" vs. User's profile
entry.content:
What is the difference between time zone settings as seen in "Maintain business users" -> "General" -> "Regional Settings" vs. the one that can be configured via "Language and Region" in the user's settings? Are they supposed to reflect each other automatically?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Number range maintenance
entry.content: We are not able to find copy or mass update function in S4Hana Cloud Public Edition. Please advise how can we maintain the number range intervals for 10 company codes? Any functionalities that can facilitate the setup for all company codes apart from manual setup?

entry.title: Functional differences between BOI's and API's
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I need to update some header fields of outbound delivery but BOI has not functionality about it.

https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_OUTBOUNDDELIVERYTP 

But on the other hand, api can make it...

Actually this is not only difference between them.

You can not update outbound delivery item' s batch by using boi but api can do.

You can not post goods issue by using boi but api can do...

Why there is differences between boi and api?  

Am I missing something? Maybe I can not find correct boi for my requirements.

Thanks,

entry.title: Shipment Cost SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Is there any documentation or learning material about shipment cost in SAP Public Cloud?

Regards

Johan

entry.title: How to enable PO automatically send to vendor feature?
entry.content:
After creating the PO, it needs to be sent directly to the supplier. Ideally, the initial order should be sent automatically, and if there are any modifications to the order, the revised order can be manually sent by clicking in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Use Purchase Scheduling agreements LU with outbound deliveries
entry.content:
Hi: My customer wants to use the Scheduling agreement type LU for Stock transport Scheduling agreements. Still, we didn't find the configuration path related to the agreement type LU and the delivery type NL and without that assignment it is not possible to take out the inventory from EWM, do you mind please let us know if it is possible to use this function with Outbound deliveries in public cloud, thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Margin Analysis - Navigation panel - Available Fields
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a situation where it was posted in the margin analysis with different characteristics, but for this case bill to party and ship to party are important.

Bill to party and ship to party are important because they cannot be seen in the margin analysis report. The navigation panel under the available fields does not offer the option of selecting bill to party and ship to party. Is there a possibility to expand the available fields with bill to party and ship to party for margin analysis?

 

Thanks!

 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance FIN Profitability Analysis

entry.title: Where i can document list with all its uses cases
entry.content: Where i can document list with all it is uses cases meaning which document type used in which report and where to use

entry.title: Accounting Determination for Credit Memo in Portuguese Scenario
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

In the Portuguese scenario, when I need to cancel an invoice that has already been sent to the customer, it is necessary to create a Credit Memo to reverse the invoice.

The issue is that for Credit Memos, a different G/L account must be used to comply with legal requirements in Portugal. Credit Memo Invoices must be associated with a "Discounts and Rebates" account, depending on the VAT.

In the configuration for Automatic Account Determination, I used the condition table 017 - Sales Org./Item Cat./Acct Key to determine the G/L account for the item category related to the Credit Memo process. This works for revenue but not for taxes.

Where can I change the account determination for taxes in this case?

Best regards,
Alynne.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Application for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to know if we can enable or connect any service and access SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud System through mobile phone using SAP application.

As I am aware we can access the system using our Internet Mobile Applications like chrome, safari etc., but can we connect our system with SAP application and access it and perform our daily tasks and activity?

Would appreciate all the responses that can help me on same. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service

entry.title: WBS - Project with Revenue - Margin Analysis not updated
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have client scenario, wherein as part of purchase Project/WBS need to be used and it need to be settled to Profitability segment.

Considering in Public Cloud only project with project profile "Project with Revenue" can be settled to profitability segment, we planned to use it for above scenario.

But when we are posting Good receipt to WBS with project profile "Project with revenue", values are not updated in margin analysis.

Request you to help with it.

Regards

Sandeep

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Increase decimals in currency
entry.content:
Good afternoon
Dear Experts

How can I increase the decimals in my USD currency, in the SAP S4 HANA CLOUD PUBLIC environment.

What SSCUI ID should I use or is it not feasible to do so?

Thank you for your kind collaboration.
Best regards.

entry.title: Assistance Needed in Configuring Trust Between Cloud Identity Services and SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently configuring trust between Cloud Identity Services and SAP BTP Account. I am following the instructions in this article Click Here  but have encountered an issue at Step 6.

According to the documentation, there should be an option labeled "YOUR CORPORATE IDP" in the Default Identity Provider field at Step 5. However, I am not seeing this option. Could someone please assist?

Well, my screen doesn't have this option -

entry.title: Authorization for Run Settlement
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I met an authorization issue about run settlement. Why finance receive a error said she had no authorization for company code asset class. Where can I find the relevant documents? and which other roles does she need?

entry.title: SOURCING & PROCUREMENT - PURCHASE RATE CONTRACT IN SAP CLOUD
entry.content:
Dear Team

Basically our clients requirement is RATE CONTRACT but in SAP we have only quantity contract & value contract. We want when We  create po with reference to  value contract , price & condition should copy in po from value contract and it should not be editable in PO. user will only enter quantity in po.  Also we are not able to add condition in value contract like basic price , discount etc. Please let us know whether schema can assign to Contract or we have to add condition through condition record.   

 

Rajesh

entry.title: BNJ and BLD test scripts are not supported in test automation tool
entry.content:
Hi,

In test automation tool when I want to select master data topics to create a test process, they are not displayed to me.

I got the master data scopes from below links.

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/BP_CLD_ENTPR/BP_CLD_ENTPR_S4CLD2202_27_Master_Data_EN_XX.htm

https://help.sap.com/docs/s4hana-best-practices/s4cld2408-master-data/start

Any idea?

BR,

Amin

entry.title: Display a List and Allow Form Printing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am new to developing applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I am seeking guidance on how to create an app in the public version. My goal is to develop an application that:

  • Displays a list of products based on specific logic.
  • Includes a button that allows printing a form for those products.

Could you help me with advice or resources on how to get started with this? Any guide, tutorial, or example would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you very much in advance for your support!

entry.title: Diminishing/Declining Method for Chart of Depreciation IFRS
entry.content:
Good day,

The business has activated ledger IFRS and according to IFRS.org the following depreciation methods are supported - straight-line method, the diminishing balance method and the
units of production method. However, we cannot find any depreciation keys that supports the diminishing balance method assigned to the Chart of Depreciation IFRS. We do see the declining method as part of Chart of Depreciation 3010.

As per IFRS.org (link) the business requires the ability to assign the diminishing/declining method to the IFRS Chart of Depreciation/Depreciation Area as well, not just the Local AU Chart of Depreciation 3010.

Kind regards,

Andro
